title: Lead frame and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: A lead frame includes a plurality of lead portions. At least a part of an upper surface of the lead portion and a sidewall surface of the lead portion is a rough surface having been subjected to roughening treatment. A value of a* in a CIELab color space of the rough surface is within a range from 12 to 19, and a value of b* is within a range from 12 to 17.
claims: 1. A lead frame, comprising: a die pad on which a semiconductor element is mountable; and a lead portion located around the die pad, wherein: an area of a smooth surface is formed in a front surface of the die pad or a front surface of the lead portion, an area of a rough surface exists in such a way as to surround an entire perimeter of the area of the smooth surface, the area of the smooth surface is made of a same material as the area of the rough surface, and the area of the smooth surface has a circular, elliptical, or oblong shape in a plan view.
